ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., weapon, armor, potion) */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the item (e.g., common, rare, legendary) */,
  "strength" TEXT /* Strength category of the item */,
  "roll_low" INTEGER /* Lower bound of the roll to obtain the item */,
  "roll_high" INTEGER /* Upper bound of the roll to obtain the item */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result associated with the item */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the item's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_strength FOREIGN KEY ("strength") REFERENCES strength_categories ("strength_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "strength_categories" (
  "strength_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strength category */,
  "strength_name" TEXT /* Name of the strength category (e.g., lesser minor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the strength category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strength category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the strength category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strength_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, game master) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventories" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being owned */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item owned */,
  "acquired_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item was acquired */,
  "acquisition_method" TEXT /* Method of acquisition (e.g., purchase, quest, trade) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventories_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventories_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rolls" (
  "roll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roll entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the roll */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being rolled for */,
  "roll_value" INTEGER /* Roll value generated by the user */,
  "roll_date" TEXT /* Date when the roll was made */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign where the roll was made */,
  "roll_type" TEXT /* Type of roll (e.g., item generation, skill check) */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the roll result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rolls_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rolls_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rolls_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign */,
  "game_master_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game master running the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the campaign started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the campaign ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_game_master_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_master_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_items" (
  "campaign_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the campaign item entry */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign using the item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being used */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item used in the campaign */,
  "acquisition_method" TEXT /* Method of acquisition (e.g., purchase, quest, trade) */,
  "acquired_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item was acquired in the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_items_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item that was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., price change, name change) */,
  "change_detail" TEXT /* Details of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_history_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was made */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_reviews_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., magical, rare) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_tags_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the permission */,
  "can_create_items" INTEGER /* Whether the user can create items */,
  "can_edit_items" INTEGER /* Whether the user can edit items */,
  "can_delete_items" INTEGER /* Whether the user can delete items */,
  "can_view_activity_logs" INTEGER /* Whether the user can view activity logs */,
  "can_view_item_history" INTEGER /* Whether the user can view item history */,
  "can_manage_users" INTEGER /* Whether the user can manage other users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., item creation, item purchase) */,
  "activity_detail" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item related to the activity */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign related to the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
